text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the opening day of the Mainichi Okan, an
important step toward the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I give her a bit of encouragement, El
Condor Pasa declares she'll make a sweeping
victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her classmate Grass Wonder will also
be running in the race, along with the peerless
Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matched against incredibly talented
Umamusume, she heads to the race to prove
herself worthy of the Japan Cup.
